description: Import contact and calendar event information from your Google account.

name: Google Calendar and Contacts Lookup

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix(auth): google changed auth callback url by @ntawileh in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/68


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/compare/1.8.0...1.8.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* update event insert behavior by @ntawileh in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/63

You can choose how to insert event info.  You can either insert the info in-line in the current note (which is the default and the only behavior before this release), or you can now choose to insert the event info in its own note and add a link to that note.  This is similar to the two options of inserting contacts.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/compare/1.7.0...1.8.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add contact file creation mode by @CodeOfficer in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/59
    * inline (default/current behavior): insert contact template in current note and rename note
    * create file and insert link: creates the contact note using the template and inserts link in the currently open note
* Fix contact insertion behavior to avoid overwriting note contents in some cases by @CodeOfficer in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/59

## New Contributors
* @CodeOfficer made their first contribution in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/59

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/compare/1.6.0...1.7.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* handle urlencoded "/" in oauth code by @ntawileh in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/51

Fixes a scenario where the auth redirect from Google has a urlencoded `/` character which results in a "Not found" message when being redirected to Obsidian after adding or authenticating an account.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/compare/1.5.0...1.5.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix issue where account does not save by @ntawileh in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/15
* add space after comma when joining multiple values in person info by @ntawileh in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/16
* fix birthday format to include leading 0 in mo/day as needed by @ntawileh in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/17


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/compare/1.2.0...1.2.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* add birthdays field by @ntawileh in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/11
* add event template field to list attendees by name by @ntawileh in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/10
* default first/middle/last names to empty string rather than 'unknown' by @ntawileh in https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/pull/12


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ntawileh/obsidian-google-lookup/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0
